headline: A Look At Expeditors (EXPD) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
summary: Why Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) is on investors’ radar Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) has drawn attention after recent share performance, with a modest month gain alongside a negative past 3 months return. This has prompted investors to reassess the freight forwarder’s current valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Expeditors International of Washington.
